relationship_to_restored_text: Interpretive contemplative layer aligned by verse. This does not replace the source-audited restored translation.

verses.mystical_translation: Speech reveals whether the whole self is bridled.
A small bit turns the horse.
A small rudder turns the ship.
A small tongue can kindle a great fire.
Unhealed speech can stain the body and inflame life.
The tongue resists human control when unhealed.
The same tongue blesses the Father and curses Divine-likeness in humans.
Blessing and curse must not share one spring.
A spring does not pour sweet and bitter together.
Wisdom is shown in gentle works.
Such wisdom does not descend from above.
Wisdom from above is pure, peaceable, gentle, reasonable, merciful, fruitful, impartial, and true.
Justice-fruit is sown in peace by peace-makers.

contemplative_note: James 3 is the temple of speech: the tongue either curses Divine-likeness or becomes a spring of wisdom from above.
